partners.label: In the same network as leading Turkish & global tourism brands

regions.title: Popular regions
regions.sub: Quickly reach suppliers in the region where you run operations.

how.title: Two sides, one network.
how.lead: Suppliers become visible; agencies find the right partner and collect quotes. Three steps for either side.
how.leadMobile: Suppliers get visible, agencies collect quotes.
how.visualSummary: Profile, verification, and quote flow come together in one panel.
how.visual1: Agencies and suppliers join the same network
how.visual2: Profile, category, and quality details get prepared for publishing
how.visual3: You appear in the right search and the quote flow begins
how.s1d: Pick your category, add your details — save as a draft anytime.
how.s2d: Your documents are manually reviewed; earn the verified badge.
how.s3d: Auto-featured for the first 24 hours; requests land in your inbox.
how.faqLead: Got another question? Reach out to our team and we'll get back to you quickly.
how.trust1d: Applications are checked by the team before they go live.
how.trust2d: Requests, quotes and first conversations stay in one panel.
how.trust3d: Our team helps with listing, verification and quote steps.
how.a1: Listing is via an annual membership. At launch the first 200 agencies are free; the first year may be free for everyone.
how.a2: An optional upgrade that highlights your business in the list and showcase. Businesses registering in the first 24 hours get a 1-day gift boost.
how.q3: Why can't I see the details?
how.a3: The full supplier list and contact/location details are members-only. Sign up free to access all data.
how.q4: When does my listing go live?
how.a4: Once your registration passes admin approval; verified listings appear in search results.
how.a5: It depends on your category — e.g. TÜRSAB certificate for agencies, D2 license for transfer companies, and other official documents.
how.q6: How does the quote system work?
how.a6: Agencies create region-based requests; relevant suppliers send private quotes directly through the system.
how.b1d: No listing required — buyer-only companies are welcome too.
how.b2d: Narrow by region, category and attributes; see it on the map.
how.b3d: Post your request and talk directly — zero commission.
how.visualB1: Buyer companies join the same network for free
how.visualB2: The filter engine brings the right partner forward
how.visualB3: Requests and quotes meet in a single panel
how.connector: Requests and quotes meet on the platform

cta.title: Claim your place in the demand feed
cta.sub: Publish your business, appear in agency searches and stop missing quote opportunities.

footer.tagline: B2B travel supplier network. A shared showcase for hotels, agencies, guides, tour companies, activities and health tourism.
footer.membershipNote: Free registration for the first 200 agencies. Listing via annual membership; boost optional.
footer.note2: Country · City · District based B2B listing
